name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a skill, the installer, or the documentation
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Install with `...`
2. Run command `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error messages, stack traces, and screenshots if relevant.

```text
<paste output here>
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.10.0 — output of `node -v`]
- npm/npx version: [e.g. 10.2.3 — output of `npm -v`]
- Install method: [e.g. `npx everything-backend`, manual clone, per-project]
- Target app: [e.g. Opencode, Cursor, Gemini IDE]
- Affected skill (if any): [e.g. `backend-test`, installer, none]

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or screenshots about the problem here.
